task_completion.visual_evidence: ReqView application is open. The project tree or title bar indicates the project is loaded (e.g., from '/home/ga/Documents/ReqView/batch_priority_project').
The 'SRS' document is selected in the project tree and its contents are displayed in the main view.
In the SRS document view, the 'Priority' column or property field for functional requirements (non-headings) is set to 'Medium'.
Section headings (e.g., '1. Introduction', '2. Overall Description') do not have a Priority value assigned.
The agent clicks the Save icon, uses File > Save, or the project tab shows no unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk) after modifications are made.
